channel.title: LLM Timeline — Together Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Together.

item.title: Deepcoder-14B-Preview (Together)
item.description: Parameters: Deepcoder-14B-Preview License: open Type: model Base DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B.

item.title: StripedHyena 7B (Together)
item.description: Parameters: StripedHyena 7B License: open Type: model RedPajama (C4), new arch beyond just Transformers

item.title: LLaMA-2-7B-32K (Together)
item.description: Parameters: LLaMA-2-7B-32K License: open Type: model 32k context window instead of 4k (Llama 2)

item.title: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Base (Together)
item.description: Parameters: 6.9B License: open Type: model AI model by Together

item.title: Pythia-Chat-Base-7B-v0.16 (Together)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by Together

item.title: GPT-NeoX-Chat-Base-20B (Together)
item.description: Parameters: GPT-NeoX-Chat-Base-20B License: open Type: model instruction-tuned 20 billion parameter language model, a 6 billion parameter moderation model, and an extensible retrieval system for including up-to-date responses from custom repositories. It was trained on the OIG-43M training dataset, which was a collaboration between Together, LAION, and Ontocord.ai. '

item.title: GPT-JT (Together)
item.description: Parameters: GPT-JT License: open Type: model
